raw: THIS IS A RETURNABLE PASS PASS MUST BE RETURNED TO CARY LIBRARY NO LATER THAN 9 a.m. THE DAY AFTER USE Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 2 adults at $5 each and 2 children under 12 free. Tickets for Saturday tours must be purchased in advance. For more information, please visit Gore Place

source_phrases.max_adults: Reduced admission for up to 2 adults at $5 each
